name: FLOW_03_FAQ_DETAILED
description: Deep-dive FAQ flow for detailed questions

qa_pairs.question: What's included in the management?
qa_pairs.answer:
Full Airbnb management includes:
• Guest communication and booking
• Cleaning and maintenance
• All supplies (linens, toiletries)
• 24/7 emergency support
• Property photography/updates
• Reporting and income transfers

Your role: None. We handle everything.

qa_pairs.question: What are the tax implications?
qa_pairs.answer:
Tax details (varies by country):
– Philippines: VAT and income tax apply
– Israel: Capital gains + ongoing income tax
– RECOMMENDED: Consult your accountant for specifics

We provide all income statements and documentation for your tax filing.

qa_pairs.question: Can I use the villa for personal stays?
qa_pairs.answer:
Yes, with conditions:
• 14 days/year reserved for owner use
• Book in advance (gaps in Airbnb calendar)
• Outside high-occupancy periods (summer trades)
• No additional cost to owner

This is negotiable in the purchase agreement.

qa_pairs.question: How does the rental booking process work?
qa_pairs.answer:
Fully automated:
1. Guest books on Airbnb
2. System notifies management company
3. Management handles check-in/check-out
4. You receive monthly payment to your account

You get real-time reports in the dashboard.

qa_pairs.question: What are maintenance costs?
qa_pairs.answer:
Standard maintenance (included in management):
• Pool cleaning: 2x per month
• General upkeep: Preventative
• Major repairs: Built into reserve fund

Reserve fund: 10% of revenue set aside annually.
You receive 90% of income.

qa_pairs.question: What if occupancy drops?
qa_pairs.answer:
We guarantee:
• 65% occupancy floor (contractual)
• If below 65% → we supplement income
• Happens <1% of the time historically
• Safety net ensures stable returns

qa_pairs.question: Can I sell my villa later?
qa_pairs.answer:
Yes, full ownership:
• You own the property outright
• Can sell anytime, no restrictions
• Management contract ends at sale
• We assist with buyer qualification
• Historical appreciation: 3-5% annually

qa_pairs.question: What about insurance coverage?
qa_pairs.answer:
Insurance included:
• Property damage: Full coverage
• Liability: Guests protected
• Natural disaster: Covered (Typhoon Policy)
• Theft/Crime: Covered

All costs included in management fees.
